tracks.meaning: the quantity of matter in a physical body, measured in kilograms or other mass units
the total amount of substance in a chemical sample, typically measured in grams or moles
a Christian religious service, especially in the Roman Catholic tradition
a musical composition for voices or instruments based on religious liturgical text
a large quantity or number of something gathered together
to gather or collect in large numbers or amounts
relating to or directed at a large number of people, as in mass media or mass communication
a large amount or number of something
an abnormal lump or growth of tissue in or on the body
a localized accumulation of disease material or foreign substance within the body
to assemble troops or military resources in concentrated numbers
a large continuous body of rock or mineral material
